name: pi-shell-acp
description: Surface pi-shell-acp (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini ACP bridge) as a first-class pi provider. The bridge runtime lives upstream; this plugin is glue only.

mcpInjection.description: RESERVED (not yet wired in prerelease). How MCP servers are injected into the child pi session. 'self' (default) lets the child pi binary attach its own pi-tools-bridge catalog. 'openclaw-bridge' forwards the OpenClaw pluginToolsMcpBridge / openClawToolsMcpBridge. 'both' attaches both (rarely useful — may produce duplicate registrations). Wired in Phase 1.4.

lockConflictPolicy.description: RESERVED (not yet wired in prerelease). Behavior when entwurf_resume receives a model that conflicts with the session's anchored model. 'strict' (default) honors pi-shell-acp's identity preservation rule and fails fast. 'new-session' automatically forks a fresh entwurf session. Wired in Phase 1.4.

piBinaryPath.description: Optional path or PATH-resolvable name of the pi binary. Accepts an absolute path, a PATH-relative command name, or any value valid as the first argument to spawn(). Defaults to 'pi' resolved against the runtime PATH.

entwurfTargetsPath.description: RESERVED (not yet wired in prerelease). Optional override for the entwurf-targets registry. Defaults to ~/.pi/agent/entwurf-targets.json. Wired in Phase 1.4.

spawnTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum time to wait for the child pi process before killing it. In the prerelease stub this is treated as a turn-level cap; the real plugin will use it strictly for ACP bootstrap.

mcpInjection.label: MCP Injection
mcpInjection.help: Choose which side owns MCP server registration in pi-shell-acp child sessions. 'self' (default) avoids duplicates with the child pi's native pi-tools-bridge.

lockConflictPolicy.label: Model Lock Conflict Policy
lockConflictPolicy.help: When resuming an entwurf session with a different model, 'strict' refuses the switch and 'new-session' starts a fresh session.

piBinaryPath.label: pi Binary Path
piBinaryPath.help: Absolute path to the pi binary (defaults to first 'pi' on PATH).

entwurfTargetsPath.label: Entwurf Targets Registry
entwurfTargetsPath.help: Override for the entwurf-targets.json registry path.

spawnTimeoutSeconds.label: Spawn Timeout (Seconds)
spawnTimeoutSeconds.help: Maximum time to wait for child pi ACP bootstrap.
